title: Plutarch, Moralia: Precepts of Statecraft
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Precepts of Statecraft.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Precepts of Statecraft.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Precepts of Statecraft': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
